options.blogdescription: 営業力と人財力で、現場の成果まで設計する

steps.code:
<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

$page_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title' => 'ホーム',
    'post_name' => 'home',
    'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/hero-home"} /--><!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/features-grid"} /--><!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/latest-news"} /-->',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_type' => 'page'
]);

if ($page_id) {
    update_option('page_on_front', $page_id);
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    echo "✓ ホームページ作成完了 (ID: $page_id)\n";
} else {
    echo "✗ ホームページ作成失敗\n";
}
?>

<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

$page_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title' => '会社概要',
    'post_name' => 'company',
    'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/company-info"} /-->',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_type' => 'page'
]);

echo $page_id ? "✓ 会社概要ページ作成完了 (ID: $page_id)\n" : "✗ 会社概要ページ作成失敗\n";
?>

<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

$page_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title' => '採用情報',
    'post_name' => 'recruit',
    'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/recruit-page"} /-->',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_type' => 'page'
]);

echo $page_id ? "✓ 採用情報ページ作成完了 (ID: $page_id)\n" : "✗ 採用情報ページ作成失敗\n";
?>

<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

$page_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title' => 'お問い合わせ',
    'post_name' => 'contact',
    'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/contact-page"} /-->',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_type' => 'page'
]);

echo $page_id ? "✓ お問い合わせページ作成完了 (ID: $page_id)\n" : "✗ お問い合わせページ作成失敗\n";
?>

<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

$page_id = wp_insert_post([
    'post_title' => '個人情報保護方針',
    'post_name' => 'privacy',
    'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/privacy-page"} /-->',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_type' => 'page'
]);

echo $page_id ? "✓ 個人情報保護方針ページ作成完了 (ID: $page_id)\n" : "✗ 個人情報保護方針ページ作成失敗\n";
?>

<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

// 既存メニュー削除
$menus = wp_get_nav_menus();
foreach ($menus as $menu) {
    wp_delete_nav_menu($menu->term_id);
}

// 新規メニュー作成
$menu_id = wp_create_nav_menu('Primary Menu');

if ($menu_id && !is_wp_error($menu_id)) {
    $pages = [
        ['slug' => 'home', 'title' => 'ホーム'],
        ['slug' => 'company', 'title' => '会社概要'],
        ['slug' => 'recruit', 'title' => '採用情報'],
        ['slug' => 'contact', 'title' => 'お問い合わせ'],
        ['slug' => 'privacy', 'title' => '個人情報保護方針']
    ];

    $position = 1;
    foreach ($pages as $page_data) {
        $page = get_page_by_path($page_data['slug']);
        if ($page) {
            wp_update_nav_menu_item($menu_id, 0, [
                'menu-item-title' => $page_data['title'],
                'menu-item-object' => 'page',
                'menu-item-object-id' => $page->ID,
                'menu-item-type' => 'post_type',
                'menu-item-status' => 'publish',
                'menu-item-position' => $position++
            ]);
        }
    }

    echo "✓ ナビゲーションメニュー作成完了 (ID: $menu_id)\n";
} else {
    echo "✗ ナビゲーションメニュー作成失敗\n";
}

// パーマリンク設定
global $wp_rewrite;
$wp_rewrite->set_permalink_structure('/%postname%/');
$wp_rewrite->flush_rules();

echo "✓ パーマリンク設定完了\n";

// 最終確認
$all_pages = get_pages(['post_status' => 'publish']);
echo "\n作成済みページ一覧:\n";
foreach ($all_pages as $page) {
    echo "  - {$page->post_title} (/{$page->post_name}/)\n";
}
?>
